target: 67. Interrogation of Mio
(Ushio's hacking was successful, and the shadow Mio became defenseless.)
(We moved to the school infirmary, and immediately began our interrogation...)
What's your name?
…Kofune… Mio…
When were you born... and from whom?
Yesterday... at the wake... Mother scanned Mio... and late that night... I was born in the cave...
By 'Mother'... you mean Haine in Shiori-chan's form, right?
...Yeah.
Did ya cut the brakes on Mio's bike?
Yeah.
To kill me?!
She didn't have to die... I just thought it would be easier if she got hurt and went to the hospital...
You mean it'd be easier to kill Mio in the hospital and swap places with her!?
Yes, since Dr. Hishigata is an ally of the shadows.
Was that Haine's order?
No, I just wanted to do it... But I failed.
Creating a Shadow of Mio... I hadn't heard about that.
Don't worry, Tokiko. Now that I think about it, I don't even know... why I wanted to kill her...
Haine gave birth to you in order to find Ushio-san's shadow, right?
Yeah... She was a traitor who opposed Mother, and she thought she might get in the way...
But today, during the funeral, Dad's shadow was killed, and Mother said it was Hizuru Minakata's doing...
And that Shin-chan and the others were in on it... So we made everyone a target.
Target... What the hell are you guys!? What are shadows!? Tell me your purpose!!
What are humans?
Hah!!?
Purpose? What is the purpose of humans?
Th-That's just... everyone... t-they're just living... without any real reason!!
I only have Mio's memories up until the 21st, and knowledge of what I can do as a shadow.
I can't copy people! Can you?
There are two types of copying: 'Transformation', where we copy onto our own bodies, and 'Childbirth', where we split our bodies to give birth to a new shadow.
We children can 'give birth' to a person's shadow only once.
Children'?
Haine can give birth as many times as she wants... But her body is weak... so it's not easy even for her.
The grandchildren generation born from me won't have the ability to give birth. 'Transformation' is something all shadows can do as many times as they want.
However, whether it's childbirth or transformation, if you copy a person, you have to erase the original within a week, or your body will turn to <color=#GF_TIPS_081>mud</color> and disappear.
I only have six days left to live... But right now, I just feel like, 'So what?'
(Mio is answering our questions honestly. It seems the hacking really was successful. It should be about time...)
Koyuba-san, you don't have to hide anymore.
Yeah.
Do you know who I am?
…Who?
Have you ever heard the name 'Kaori Koyuba'?
Kaori Koyuba... somewhere...
Ah. The idol Kaori Koyuba-chan? Why is she here...?
Um... Ajiro-kun, is it okay if I say it?
Before that, she's not included in Haine's 'targets', right?
Even before coming to the school tonight, no information was shared?
I haven't heard anything. I just found out for the first time that she's even on Hitogashima.
I see.
Thank goodness…
(With this, I've confirmed that Haine and the others don't know Koyuba-san is our ally.)
(There are various things I want to ask. Let's confirm them in order...)
(What should I ask...)
"Tell me more about Shadows"
"What do you do for meals?"
"What's the Shadow population?"
"You and Mio have a different vibe, though?"
Tell me more about Shadows.
The children Haine gave birth to. Doppelgängers that copied human forms... They take over families and live pretending to be human.
Do shadows also have an instinct to leave descendants and prosper, or is it just a superficial imitation of humans?
I don't know…
What do you do for meals?
Do you eat three meals a day properly? Will you starve to death if you don't eat?
Shadows live by eating information. Because 'information', including taste, is our nutrition.
Mother... Haine forbids everyone from eating humans outside of childbirth and transformation.
But even without being told, I kind of want to eat okonomiyaki.
Because that tastes better, and there's information in eggs, pork, and cabbage too.
If we don't eat, of course we'll starve to death just like humans.
...Haine only eats humans. I think it's probably because she prefers the taste.
But she would starve to death like that, so we give her blood transfusions... Human blood contains an abundance of information.
Eating information... What are shadow bodies made of?
Body? What is it, I wonder... Haine calls it mud. That's about all I know...
What's the shadow population?
…I don't know.
It seems Haine hasn't given birth for the past few decades as her weakening progressed.
She only pushed herself to give birth for the sake of the resurrection ritual.
Currently, the shadows hiding in human form should be a few children born within the last two months, and the grandchildren born from those children.
So the number of shadows is unknown...
I already confirmed several sets of shadows at today's funeral venue. Besides the Kobayakawa family, there were faces I recognized.
The Kogaito family and the Hitobuchi family. The rest require investigation.
Is the number of Strays also unknown?
Sorry, I have no idea.
I think probably even Haine hasn't fully grasped it.
...Mio, your personality, or rather... Your vibe feels different from the real one.
Shadows are perfect copies of people. My body, voice, fingerprints, DNA, memories, they're all exactly the same as Mio's, but...
Only when it comes to memories... You know how people forget things?
Selective memory?
Yes. Shadows don't have the function to 'forget' unpleasant memories or trivial, silly memories.
So, I remember all events equally. Even things the person themselves forgot, or repressed feelings, I copy them over during the copying process.
I think that difference is what creates the difference in personality.
Repressed feelings…
B-But what about Sis!? Sis is exactly the same as Sis!
Sis's memory is at a human level, or rather... ...Isn't it because she's a defective product?
Watch how you say that.
...Well... I guess it means Ushio is special.
(...The more I ask, the deeper the mystery gets. But I want to get as much information as possible right now.)
(Other things I should ask are--)
"What is the ecology of shadows?"
"What are the shadows' means of sharing information?"
"There are a few different types of shadows, right?"
"About the data of copied objects"
What is the ecology of shadows like? Even if you live disguised as a human, you can't stay in that form for years, right?
Yeah... we have to age, weaken, and eventually die. Well, it's just pretending to be dead, though.
Aging shadows fake their deaths with the help of Hishigata Clinic, and disappear from society...
On the surface they die, transform into their next target, and begin living as a new, different person.
The normal ecology of a shadow is just repeating this cycle... That's what I heard from Dad.
When they transform over and over again, the copy accuracy begins to degrade...
The copy becomes incomplete and their shape breaks down, they develop memory disorders, personality disorders, and so on, and gradually become unable to mimic humans.
Those who end up like that leave human settlements and become Strays.
Tell me about the shadows' means of sharing information.
Haine can send simple commands... like 'go to such-and-such place' or 'kill so-and-so', transmitting them like radio waves.
But this is one-way, so the children and grandchildren can't reply to Haine.
To communicate, they have to use the same methods as humans... conversation, phone calls, leaving notes, or meet directly, touch, and show each other their memories.
So that really is the same for everyone.
There are a few different types of shadows, right? Like ones that look like babies, or ones with long limbs like monsters, or muscular ones.
The ones that look like babies are Strays. Old shadows whose human forms have broken down.
Their copy ability has weakened, and they don't have the ability to give birth. Their transformations aren't perfect either, so they rarely show themselves in public.
Strays eat things like mice, birds, fish, and insects, living quietly in places where people won't see them.
Their appearances vary with individual differences, but in the end, after they all become like babies, they lose their memories and personalities, turn to mud, and disappear.
Shadows grow closer to babies as they age... Perhaps it's the same as the essence of humans.
Shadows specialized for fighting by signals sent from Haine are called 'Hitonashi'.
Most individuals deviate from the human form, their muscles hypertrophying or their limbs growing long.
While their combat ability improves ridiculously, their intelligence drops, and they lose their ability to think as humans.
My Rosencrantz and Guildenstern are Hitonashi, then.
What's with those names...
Naming them is my hobby.
Members of the Hishigata family recognized by Haine receive shadows that respond to their voice and faithfully follow orders... This is an old tradition.
...Which one is Rosencrantz?
The one who's always spacing out and drooling is Roz, and the grumpy one with the injured right hand is Gil.
Since they're based on Strays, they don't have copy abilities, but their enhanced combat ability is far superior to other Strays.
The nurse... Negoro-san's shadow... Is that Dad's!?
Yeah, she's Haine's caretaker.
I have a question about copying objects.
About Totsumura-san's handgun used in the gym fight, that was a copy made by Ushio.
Even if the bullets are used up, if it's erased and printed again, the bullets return to their initial full state.
Yeah.
But the data for the gasoline that was set on fire apparently disappeared from Ushio's head.
Yeah, exactly! Why is that?
With the transformation or childbirth of inorganic objects, whether that data can be used again or not is the difference between consumption and destruction.
What's that?
Consumption', like batteries or bullets, can be restored to their initial state if printed again, but things that have been 'destroyed' cannot.
Lighting gasoline on fire and burning it probably counts as destruction.
So the handgun was consumed, and the gasoline was destroyed.
Yeah.
Then it's no good if this handgun breaks or falls apart either, huh.
For copies of non-human, inorganic objects, is their shadow... the 2D plane also their weakness?
In the case of transformation, the shadow itself is disguised, so the 2D plane is its weakness. But the shadow of an inorganic object that was given birth to is a normal shadow.
To destroy them, you just have to break the 3D object... ...I don't understand the principle behind it.
It's true that the nail gun stayed broken.
...However, the fact that Ushio carried over the destroyed data to the next loop means...
Even if Shinpei Ajiro loops, only Ushio's time isn't going back.
Yeah. To put it one way, my body is basically made of data, so...
You're looping by attaching yourself to Shinpei's consciousness as it goes back in time.
That's why Shide said it too, but I think if I die, that's the end of it. Even if we loop, the current me won't be there anymore.
(Have I asked everything I wanted to for now...?)
Sorry, Shin-chan... I don't have much useful information...
Th-That's... not something you need to apologize for!!
Hey, hey... She's a shadow, Sou-kun!!
Ah, no... but...
...Ah, damn it!! This is throwing me off~~~!!
Haine needs to 'eat' a massive amount of people for her resurrection... The childbirths are to create soldiers for that purpose.
Dad and I were trying to resurrect Haine for Mom's sake. I thought it was food for that...
But it was different. I was deceived... They have a different purpose...!!
In Hiruko Cave, that guy said it, didn't he. That Dad 'already consented'...
Screwing with us... Dad... He thinks it's fine even if we die!!
…Dad…
There's a lot I can't accept, but... Dr. Hishigata should know Haine's true purpose.
There might be some kind of solution there...
I have an appointment to meet Dad tonight at 10.
Okay, then we know what to do next.
…I'm going…
Sou-kun!? Are you planning to go out alone!?
Hey! Wait, Sou!!
Like I can just dawdle around...!! I'm going back right now to meet Dad...!
Wait.
...Please move...
Your family is on the side of the shadows, Sou Hishigata...
It's too dangerous... I can't let you go alone anymore!
He's right. Let's all go to Hishigata Clinic.
It's so itchy~~~! There are so many mosquitoes here!
…Mio.
Huh?
Ah, no…
…Me?
Yeah... Protect... Mio.
Is that an order?
An order, or rather... Yeah... well... I guess it's an order...
...I mean, Shin-chan, are you scared of me? You're keeping a lot of distance.
W-Well, yeah... It'd be a lie to say I'm not scared. How many times do you think you've killed me...?
That's a story from another world, right? I haven't killed anyone yet.
Th... That's... true, but...
Can I ask ya something too?
Y-Yeah... What is it...?
Did ya have a girlfriend in Tokyo?
Guh...!
Girlfriend?
G-Girlfriend~~!!? Wh... wh... what are you asking him!!
Shin-chan, the way you sometimes switch to standard Japanese is suspicious... Isn't it suspicious?
I don't have one...! Wakayama dialect doesn't work in Tokyo, okay!? When in Rome, I do as the Romans do!
Then, what's your relationship with Kaori-chan?
What do you mean... Koyuba-san is a former classmate. Isn't that in your memories too...?
H-Hey, you!!
Hmm... Well, that was just a joke, though.
If so... have you ever thought about why I don't call Shin-chan 'Onii-chan'?
Eh...? W-Well, that's...
O-Oh... our ride is here! We'll talk about this later!
Hey, Shin-chan, I'll protect Mio just as ordered.
But you know. The only one who can truly protect Mio is you, Shin-chan, right?
Well then, shall we get in?
...I-I don't get what she means!! What's her deal! Come on, let's go, let's go!! Shin-chan!
O-oh… yeah.
Everyone's in... let's go.
…Yes.
